channel.title: Posts on Shantanu Rahman's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on Shantanu Rahman's Blog

item.title: Starting a blog
item.description: I have been on a journey of coding, learning, reading for a long time. It did occur to me multiple times that maybe I really should start a blog. This is not just for others to read but also as an acknowledgement to myself as a person I have become and who I strive to be in the future. Over the years my interests change. It could have been interesting to see across the years my thoughts evolving and, hopefully, growing.
